57. Bacteria infected with virus that showed
radioactivity had- (Pg. 102, E)
A) radioactive DNA (S32)
B) radioactive DNA (Sss)
C) radioactive DNA (P32)
D) radioactive DNA (Pas)

on
6.2.2 Properties of Genetic
Material (DNA vs RNA)
59. RNA is genetic material in- (Pg. 102, E)
A) TMV
B) QB Bacteriophage
C) Both A and B
D) None of these
60. Properties of genetic material include- (Pg.
103, E)
A) Stable B) Mutable
C) Replicable D) All of these
61. A - Stability as a property of genetic
material was very evident in Griffith's
transforming principle.
